set.body: All backends are 0.0.0.9000 'Scaffold' packages. Bring to releasable: real Title/Description, Version 0.1.0, NEWS.md, URL/BugReports to monorepo, per-subdir R CMD check matrix job in CI on target OSes (must check cleanly WITHOUT system libs present — mock/unavailable degradation). Authors/LICENSE already fixed to Bradley Buchsbaum 2026-07-09. amatrix.models is OUT of release scope (decision D2).
set.title: Sub-package release metadata pass: real titles/descriptions, version 0.1.0, NEWS, per-subdir R CMD check CI
